peopleCount.title: How many people?
peopleCount.subtitle: Select the number of people in your group

templateModal.title: Template Mode
templateModal.subtitle: You have
templateModal.subtitlePeople: people. How should the template be applied?

singleTemplate.title: 1 Template
singleTemplate.description: All {{count}} people share a single template layout

multipleTemplate.title: Multiple Templates
multipleTemplate.description: Choose a different template per person or pair

bonusSelection.title: Bonus Activity
bonusSelection.subtitle: Would you like to join our special bonus activity?

join.title: Join Bonus
join.description: You currently get {{count}} prints, if you join the bonus, you get {{double}} prints!

bonusGuide.title: Get Your Bonus 🎁
bonusGuide.subtitle: Leave us a review on Google Maps to receive a bonus!

steps.step1: Scan the QR code to open Ignos on Google Maps
steps.step2: Give us a rating and write a short review
steps.step3: Show your review to our staff to claim your bonus
steps.step4: Follow Instagram @ignos.studio to claim your bonus

templateSelection.title: Select Templates
templateSelection.comingSoonDesc: Templates for this category are under development

photoArrange.title: Arrange Your Photos
photoArrange.subtitle: Select a photo from the gallery and click on a slot to place it

success.title: Print Successful!
success.description: All photos have been saved and are ready to print.

confirm.title: Print Confirmation
confirm.description: Are you sure with this photo arrangement? The photos will be printed immediately.

addons.title: Additional Prints
addons.subtitle: Would you like to add more prints?

4r-print.title: 4R Photo Print
4r-print.description: Print 4R photos with sharp results, accurate colors, and premium paper.

10r-print.title: A4 Photo Print
10r-print.description: Print A4 (10R) photos with high quality.

keychain.title: Keychain
keychain.description: Turn your favorite photo into a cute custom keychain.

id-card.title: ID Card
id-card.description: Print your photo as a custom ID card with attractive design.

bingkai-4r.title: 4R Frame
bingkai-4r.description: Enhance your 4R photo with an aesthetic ready-to-display frame.

bingkai-a4.title: A4 Frame
bingkai-a4.description: Elegant frame for A4 photos, perfect for decoration.

flower-hotwheels.title: Flower Hotwheels
flower-hotwheels.description: Unique decoration with flowers/miniatures, perfect for special gifts.

cermin-foto-3d.title: 3D Photo Mirror
cermin-foto-3d.description: Custom mirror with aesthetic 3D photo effect.

boneka-tabung.title: Custom Doll
boneka-tabung.description: Custom doll with your photo, perfect as a gift.

puzzle-foto.title: Photo Puzzle
puzzle-foto.description: Turn your photo into a fun puzzle, perfect as a unique gift (pre-order).

photo-calender.title: Photo Calendar
photo-calender.description: A personalized photo calendar for your memories.

story.title: Create Instagram Story?
story.subtitle: Get a <1>free softcopy</1> by creating a story & mentioning us on Instagram!

yes.title: Yes, create a story!
yes.description: Follow & mention us on Instagram, get softcopy <1>FREE</1>

no.title: No, i'll skip
no.description: Skip this step, softcopy will have an extra charge

instructions.title: How to get free softcopy:
steps: Post a story & mention our username

complete.title: Process Completed!
complete.subtitle: Your photos are ready to print. Please proceed to the <1>cashier</1> to complete your payment.

cashier.title: Go to Cashier
cashier.description: Show this page to the cashier staff to complete your transaction.

story.title: Free Softcopy 🎉
story.description: Don't forget to post a story & mention us!

extraCharge.title: Additional Softcopy Fee
extraCharge.description: Will be added to your total bill at the cashier
